'''Morkov''' was once a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he had become an [[Arms dealer/Legends|arms dealer]] selling illegal [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] hardware. He resided in the [[Keren/Legends|Keren]] hotel on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. A former [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] by the name of [[Mort]] wanted revenge on Morkov for leaving him to [[Death/Legends|die]] during the final days of the [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Mort)|Battle of Kashyyyk]]. He sent an individual to find information on his illegal arms deals, but when the individual got there he found Morkov flanked by two [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]]. The individual informed him they were working for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]], which was a lie, and that they needed five crates of [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]]. Morkov sent the individual to pick up five creates of these weapons from [[Uwo Poal]] at [[Dee'ja Peak/Legends|Dee'ja Peak]] on Naboo. The individual then returned to Mort on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and was tasked to kill Morkov. The individual managed to kill both him and his two [[Droid/Legends|droid]] bodyguards.

*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' {{1st}}
